titleStmt.title: SII 25.140: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 140. (A.R. No. 140 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the Niṉṟa Nārāyaṇa-perumāḷ temple.
This record may be assigned to the 13th Century on palaeographical grounds.

It records an order (ōlai) of Kāṅgēyaṉ granting 6 mā of lands along with income from taxes such as kaḍamai, antarāyam, achchuvari, Veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ, echchōṟu, kūṟṟariśi and other iṟai-kuḍimai for the various services including tiruppaḍimāṟṟu, for conducting a sandhi called Vēṇḍaviṉiyāṉ-sandi after the donor's name and for the tiruppōṉagam to the deity Kōlavarāha-viṇṇagar-emberumāṉ, at the instance of Teṉṉavaṉ . •••

The grant land of 6 mā was converted as kuḍitāṅgip-paḍi from the 12 mā of lands measured by padiṉeṇśāṇ-kōl purchased by Veḍiyāṟṟūrār from Pālpoṉṉaṅgainallūr of Paṭṭamaṅgalam in Tirunandiyūr-muṭṭam. A certain Teṉṉavaṉ insisted that tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam lands should be given for the worship of the above deity.
A number of signatories including Kaṇḍaṉ Udayañcheydāṉ alias Kāṅgēyaṉ are mentioned to have attested the document.
The chief who is stated to have issued orders is known from a number of records to have served under Māṟavaṟmaṉ Sundara-pāṇḍya I. (acc. 1216 A.D.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
...§ svastiśrī . kāṅkeyaṉ Olai tāvatu . Ik kolavarāka viṇṇakar Emperumāṉ koyil śrīvaiṣṇavarum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum nampimārum kaṇṭu Ivvemperumāṉukkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭa nimantaṅkaḷukkut tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam
taraveṇumeṉṟu teṉṉavan namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil tirunan=tiyūr muṭṭattup paṭṭamaṅkalattup pālpoṉṉaṅkai nallūr vayalil veḷiyāṟṟūrār koṇṭa nilattile patiṉeṇcāṇ kolāl nilam paṉṉiraṇṭu māviṉāl kuṭitā
ṅkippaṭiyākki nilam Āṟumā kku Iṟukkum kaṭamai Antarāyam Accuvari veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai kuṭimaikaḷum namperāl veṇṭaviṉiyā ṉeṉṟoru cantikku tiruppoṉakam Uḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku śrīsundarapāṇḍyadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal tantom . In nilattukku ceruteṭaṅkaḷile tiruvāḻik kallum nāṭṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷka Ippa
ṭikku kaṇṭaṉutaiyañ ceytāṉāṉa kāṅkeyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ippaṭikku paḻantiparāya ṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai Utaiya tivākara § muventaveḷāṉeḻuttu § Ippaṭikku Ivai kurukulattaraya ṉeḻuttu § śrī
vaiṣṇavar rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 25.140 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
